prompt:
Use case: social ad shot 1 of 6
Primary request: Investor-style opener: fragmented compliance risk data from incidents, audits, actions, and route plans appears as chaotic floating panels, then converges into one clean central frame.
Scene/background: abstract digital control room, no people
Subject: floating compliance dashboards, incident logs, audit sheets, map snippets
Action: beat 1: chaotic panel motion; beat 2: panels align; beat 3: central frame locks
Camera: slow dolly-in with subtle parallax
Lighting/mood: high-contrast corporate cinematic
Color palette: navy, slate, steel, electric blue
Style/format: premium B2B promo
Text (verbatim): "Risk is fragmented."
Constraints: all-ages safe, no real people, no logos, no copyrighted characters
